records.m_Talk_ENG: For something that was supposed to be a C.O. outbreak, it felt way too quiet...
records.m_Talk_DEU: For something that was supposed to be a C.O. outbreak, it felt way too quiet...
records.m_Talk_FRA: For something that was supposed to be a C.O. outbreak, it felt way too quiet...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those bug-egg-looking things are what spawned a C.O.?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those bug-egg-looking things are what spawned a C.O.?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those bug-egg-looking things are what spawned a C.O.?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is correct.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is correct.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is correct.

records.m_Talk_ENG: On top of that, the Corruption rays from these eggs match the signature waveform detected when the intruders went on their rampage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: On top of that, the Corruption rays from these eggs match the signature waveform detected when the intruders went on their rampage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: On top of that, the Corruption rays from these eggs match the signature waveform detected when the intruders went on their rampage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We found multiple clusters like this in each district.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We found multiple clusters like this in each district.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We found multiple clusters like this in each district.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is roughly the same number as the intruders headquarters estimated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is roughly the same number as the intruders headquarters estimated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is roughly the same number as the intruders headquarters estimated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Are you saying those eggs were originally people?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Are you saying those eggs were originally people?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Are you saying those eggs were originally people?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, it is still just a hypothesis for now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, it is still just a hypothesis for now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, it is still just a hypothesis for now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's the danger level?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's the danger level?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's the danger level?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If there's a silver lining... they're not explosive, and they're not C.O. eggs about to hatch. The risk level is low.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If there's a silver lining... they're not explosive, and they're not C.O. eggs about to hatch. The risk level is low.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If there's a silver lining... they're not explosive, and they're not C.O. eggs about to hatch. The risk level is low.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They resemble dormant specimens found in the Shangri-La ecosystem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They resemble dormant specimens found in the Shangri-La ecosystem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They resemble dormant specimens found in the Shangri-La ecosystem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Shangri-La ecosystem?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Shangri-La ecosystem?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Shangri-La ecosystem?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Minha, who is this...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Minha, who is this...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Minha, who is this...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She is an external collaborator. We are working together temporarily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She is an external collaborator. We are working together temporarily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She is an external collaborator. We are working together temporarily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: "External collaborator" sounds a bit stiff. How about "partner"?
records.m_Talk_DEU: "External collaborator" sounds a bit stiff. How about "partner"?
records.m_Talk_FRA: "External collaborator" sounds a bit stiff. How about "partner"?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Partner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Partner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Partner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, you do not need to enforce confidentiality clauses with my partner. Just explain everything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, you do not need to enforce confidentiality clauses with my partner. Just explain everything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, you do not need to enforce confidentiality clauses with my partner. Just explain everything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shangri-La is a cryogenic Counterside located within Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shangri-La is a cryogenic Counterside located within Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shangri-La is a cryogenic Counterside located within Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: C.O.s that inhabit it typically cease activity and enter dormancy unless there is a special reason not to.
records.m_Talk_DEU: C.O.s that inhabit it typically cease activity and enter dormancy unless there is a special reason not to.
records.m_Talk_FRA: C.O.s that inhabit it typically cease activity and enter dormancy unless there is a special reason not to.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So these eggs are asleep?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So these eggs are asleep?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So these eggs are asleep?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is our assessment. On top of that, these egg sacs are extremely durable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is our assessment. On top of that, these egg sacs are extremely durable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is our assessment. On top of that, these egg sacs are extremely durable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We tried to inspect the interior directly, but even our equipment couldn't penetrate them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We tried to inspect the interior directly, but even our equipment couldn't penetrate them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We tried to inspect the interior directly, but even our equipment couldn't penetrate them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even a dismantling drill that pierces Category 3 armor couldn't get through?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even a dismantling drill that pierces Category 3 armor couldn't get through?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even a dismantling drill that pierces Category 3 armor couldn't get through?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is there a reason they were made that tough?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is there a reason they were made that tough?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is there a reason they were made that tough?

records.m_Talk_ENG: To protect themselves from external threats. At this level, they'd remain intact even if a nuclear weapon hit them directly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To protect themselves from external threats. At this level, they'd remain intact even if a nuclear weapon hit them directly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To protect themselves from external threats. At this level, they'd remain intact even if a nuclear weapon hit them directly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Protect themselves? From what, exactly?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Protect themselves? From what, exactly?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Protect themselves? From what, exactly?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That would likely be...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That would likely be...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That would likely be...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A disaster so severe that even they could not withstand it, erupting right here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A disaster so severe that even they could not withstand it, erupting right here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A disaster so severe that even they could not withstand it, erupting right here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a broadcast to all Ground One City Management personnel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a broadcast to all Ground One City Management personnel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a broadcast to all Ground One City Management personnel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get as far away from the Grand Dimension Crevice as possible. Prepare for a highest-level disaster.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get as far away from the Grand Dimension Crevice as possible. Prepare for a highest-level disaster.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get as far away from the Grand Dimension Crevice as possible. Prepare for a highest-level disaster.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Senior?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Senior?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Senior?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A giant entity has been reported at Charade's Grand Dimension Crevice, sharing characteristics with the intruders currently wanted in Ground One.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A giant entity has been reported at Charade's Grand Dimension Crevice, sharing characteristics with the intruders currently wanted in Ground One.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A giant entity has been reported at Charade's Grand Dimension Crevice, sharing characteristics with the intruders currently wanted in Ground One.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just moments ago, Qlipha energy spreading from it has engulfed the entire city.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just moments ago, Qlipha energy spreading from it has engulfed the entire city.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just moments ago, Qlipha energy spreading from it has engulfed the entire city.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Therefore, Ground One is now activating the final protocol for Grand Dimension Crevice collapse response.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Therefore, Ground One is now activating the final protocol for Grand Dimension Crevice collapse response.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Therefore, Ground One is now activating the final protocol for Grand Dimension Crevice collapse response.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That in the sky... Is that a dimensional ship?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That in the sky... Is that a dimensional ship?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That in the sky... Is that a dimensional ship?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Minha, just how serious is the situation the Senior described?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Minha, just how serious is the situation the Senior described?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Minha, just how serious is the situation the Senior described?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A highest-level disaster, Grand Dimension Crevice collapse scenario...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A highest-level disaster, Grand Dimension Crevice collapse scenario...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A highest-level disaster, Grand Dimension Crevice collapse scenario...

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the worst case, it means all of Ground One could be annihilated within a matter of hours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the worst case, it means all of Ground One could be annihilated within a matter of hours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the worst case, it means all of Ground One could be annihilated within a matter of hours.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Minha, I need to go
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Minha, I need to go
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Minha, I need to go
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get in. I know where you're headed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get in. I know where you're headed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get in. I know where you're headed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tomorrow, which we always assumed would come without question, was never guaranteed in the first place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tomorrow, which we always assumed would come without question, was never guaranteed in the first place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tomorrow, which we always assumed would come without question, was never guaranteed in the first place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Behind the bustling cityscape and the warm seasons created by weather controllers lay the true face of a world that had been merciless from the very beginning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Behind the bustling cityscape and the warm seasons created by weather controllers lay the true face of a world that had been merciless from the very beginning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Behind the bustling cityscape and the warm seasons created by weather controllers lay the true face of a world that had been merciless from the very beginning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sky, stained in an ominous crimson, shimmered coldly, as if whispering...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sky, stained in an ominous crimson, shimmered coldly, as if whispering...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sky, stained in an ominous crimson, shimmered coldly, as if whispering...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That the end of the world had arrived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That the end of the world had arrived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That the end of the world had arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The call cannot be connected due to unstable signal conditions. Please try again later...
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The call cannot be connected due to unstable signal conditions. Please try again later...
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The call cannot be connected due to unstable signal conditions. Please try again later...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It won't help. Once the density of Corruption rays rises, all conventional communications go down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It won't help. Once the density of Corruption rays rises, all conventional communications go down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It won't help. Once the density of Corruption rays rises, all conventional communications go down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think they'll be all right? They're with the Administration, so they should be safe, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think they'll be all right? They're with the Administration, so they should be safe, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think they'll be all right? They're with the Administration, so they should be safe, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never seen her this shaken, not even in front of monsters...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never seen her this shaken, not even in front of monsters...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never seen her this shaken, not even in front of monsters...

records.m_Talk_ENG: They'll be fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They'll be fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They'll be fine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So take this first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So take this first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So take this first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: An Administration-issued Eternium Shield. It blocks corruption.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An Administration-issued Eternium Shield. It blocks corruption.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An Administration-issued Eternium Shield. It blocks corruption.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm so used to it that I forgot for a moment that you're not a Counter but just an ordinary person...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm so used to it that I forgot for a moment that you're not a Counter but just an ordinary person...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm so used to it that I forgot for a moment that you're not a Counter but just an ordinary person...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sky just flashed. What happened?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sky just flashed. What happened?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sky just flashed. What happened?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The dimensional ship...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The dimensional ship...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The dimensional ship...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's crashing! Leave the car and run to that shelter!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's crashing! Leave the car and run to that shelter!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's crashing! Leave the car and run to that shelter!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough* *Cough!*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough* *Cough!*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough* *Cough!*

records.m_Talk_ENG:
What just happened? That ship was fine just a moment ago. How could it suddenly
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
What just happened? That ship was fine just a moment ago. How could it suddenly
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
What just happened? That ship was fine just a moment ago. How could it suddenly
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG:
What the
8g?! The sky...
records.m_Talk_DEU:
What the
8g?! The sky...
records.m_Talk_FRA:
What the
8g?! The sky...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sky...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sky...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sky...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch...! Don't look! Duck!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch...! Don't look! Duck!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch...! Don't look! Duck!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was close.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was close.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was close.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you had looked even a second longer...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you had looked even a second longer...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you had looked even a second longer...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaaah!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaaah!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaaah!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-help! Someone, please...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-help! Someone, please...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-help! Someone, please...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's happening? Why are people floating up into the air...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's happening? Why are people floating up into the air...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's happening? Why are people floating up into the air...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Tch!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Tch!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Tch!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can still reach them. I'll try to save those people somehow...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can still reach them. I'll try to save those people somehow...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can still reach them. I'll try to save those people somehow...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The voices of those crying out for help fell silent, cut off by something horribly twisted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The voices of those crying out for help fell silent, cut off by something horribly twisted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The voices of those crying out for help fell silent, cut off by something horribly twisted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After the screams stopped, a sudden downpour soaked my shoulders.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After the screams stopped, a sudden downpour soaked my shoulders.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After the screams stopped, a sudden downpour soaked my shoulders.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The metallic stench that burned my nose.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The metallic stench that burned my nose.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The metallic stench that burned my nose.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The rain was redder than the shadow of the crimson sky, and strangely warm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The rain was redder than the shadow of the crimson sky, and strangely warm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The rain was redder than the shadow of the crimson sky, and strangely warm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this... blood?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this... blood?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this... blood?

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I looked up just now...
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I looked up just now...
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I looked up just now...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something was coming down from the sky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something was coming down from the sky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something was coming down from the sky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something came down into the city?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something came down into the city?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something came down into the city?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where did it go?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where did it go?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where did it go?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That way... I mean...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That way... I mean...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That way... I mean...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have to go where Momo is!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have to go where Momo is!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have to go where Momo is!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right now!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Get as far away from the Grand Dimension Crevice as possible. Prepare for a highest-level disaster.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Senior?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Senior?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Senior?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A giant entity has been reported at Charade's Grand Dimension Crevice, sharing characteristics with the intruders currently wanted in Ground One.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A giant entity has been reported at Charade's Grand Dimension Crevice, sharing characteristics with the intruders currently wanted in Ground One.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A giant entity has been reported at Charade's Grand Dimension Crevice, sharing characteristics with the intruders currently wanted in Ground One.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just moments ago, Qlipha energy spreading from it has engulfed the entire city.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just moments ago, Qlipha energy spreading from it has engulfed the entire city.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just moments ago, Qlipha energy spreading from it has engulfed the entire city.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Therefore, Ground One is now activating the final protocol for Grand Dimension Crevice collapse response.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Therefore, Ground One is now activating the final protocol for Grand Dimension Crevice collapse response.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Therefore, Ground One is now activating the final protocol for Grand Dimension Crevice collapse response.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That in the sky... Is that a dimensional ship?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That in the sky... Is that a dimensional ship?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That in the sky... Is that a dimensional ship?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Minha, just how serious is the situation the Senior described?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Minha, just how serious is the situation the Senior described?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Minha, just how serious is the situation the Senior described?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A highest-level disaster, Grand Dimension Crevice collapse scenario...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A highest-level disaster, Grand Dimension Crevice collapse scenario...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A highest-level disaster, Grand Dimension Crevice collapse scenario...

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the worst case, it means all of Ground One could be annihilated within a matter of hours.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the worst case, it means all of Ground One could be annihilated within a matter of hours.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the worst case, it means all of Ground One could be annihilated within a matter of hours.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Minha, I need to go
8g!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Minha, I need to go
8g!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Minha, I need to go
8g!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Get in. I know where you're headed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Get in. I know where you're headed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Get in. I know where you're headed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tomorrow, which we always assumed would come without question, was never guaranteed in the first place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tomorrow, which we always assumed would come without question, was never guaranteed in the first place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tomorrow, which we always assumed would come without question, was never guaranteed in the first place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Behind the bustling cityscape and the warm seasons created by weather controllers lay the true face of a world that had been merciless from the very beginning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Behind the bustling cityscape and the warm seasons created by weather controllers lay the true face of a world that had been merciless from the very beginning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Behind the bustling cityscape and the warm seasons created by weather controllers lay the true face of a world that had been merciless from the very beginning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The sky, stained in an ominous crimson, shimmered coldly, as if whispering...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The sky, stained in an ominous crimson, shimmered coldly, as if whispering...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The sky, stained in an ominous crimson, shimmered coldly, as if whispering...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That the end of the world had arrived.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That the end of the world had arrived.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That the end of the world had arrived.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...The call cannot be connected due to unstable signal conditions. Please try again later...
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...The call cannot be connected due to unstable signal conditions. Please try again later...
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...The call cannot be connected due to unstable signal conditions. Please try again later...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It won't help. Once the density of Corruption rays rises, all conventional communications go down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It won't help. Once the density of Corruption rays rises, all conventional communications go down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It won't help. Once the density of Corruption rays rises, all conventional communications go down.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think they'll be all right? They're with the Administration, so they should be safe, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think they'll be all right? They're with the Administration, so they should be safe, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think they'll be all right? They're with the Administration, so they should be safe, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've never seen her this shaken, not even in front of monsters...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've never seen her this shaken, not even in front of monsters...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've never seen her this shaken, not even in front of monsters...

root.m_Talk_ENG: They'll be fine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They'll be fine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They'll be fine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So take this first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So take this first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So take this first.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: An Administration-issued Eternium Shield. It blocks corruption.
root.m_Talk_DEU: An Administration-issued Eternium Shield. It blocks corruption.
root.m_Talk_FRA: An Administration-issued Eternium Shield. It blocks corruption.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm so used to it that I forgot for a moment that you're not a Counter but just an ordinary person...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm so used to it that I forgot for a moment that you're not a Counter but just an ordinary person...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm so used to it that I forgot for a moment that you're not a Counter but just an ordinary person...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The sky just flashed. What happened?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The sky just flashed. What happened?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The sky just flashed. What happened?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The dimensional ship...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The dimensional ship...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The dimensional ship...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's crashing! Leave the car and run to that shelter!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's crashing! Leave the car and run to that shelter!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's crashing! Leave the car and run to that shelter!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough* *Cough!*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough* *Cough!*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough* *Cough!*

root.m_Talk_ENG:
What just happened? That ship was fine just a moment ago. How could it suddenly
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
What just happened? That ship was fine just a moment ago. How could it suddenly
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
What just happened? That ship was fine just a moment ago. How could it suddenly
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG:
What the
8g?! The sky...
root.m_Talk_DEU:
What the
8g?! The sky...
root.m_Talk_FRA:
What the
8g?! The sky...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The sky...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The sky...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The sky...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch...! Don't look! Duck!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch...! Don't look! Duck!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch...! Don't look! Duck!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: That was close.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That was close.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That was close.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you had looked even a second longer...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you had looked even a second longer...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you had looked even a second longer...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aaaah!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aaaah!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aaaah!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: H-help! Someone, please...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: H-help! Someone, please...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: H-help! Someone, please...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's happening? Why are people floating up into the air...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's happening? Why are people floating up into the air...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's happening? Why are people floating up into the air...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Tch!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Tch!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Tch!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can still reach them. I'll try to save those people somehow...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can still reach them. I'll try to save those people somehow...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can still reach them. I'll try to save those people somehow...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The voices of those crying out for help fell silent, cut off by something horribly twisted.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The voices of those crying out for help fell silent, cut off by something horribly twisted.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The voices of those crying out for help fell silent, cut off by something horribly twisted.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After the screams stopped, a sudden downpour soaked my shoulders.
root.m_Talk_DEU: After the screams stopped, a sudden downpour soaked my shoulders.
root.m_Talk_FRA: After the screams stopped, a sudden downpour soaked my shoulders.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The metallic stench that burned my nose.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The metallic stench that burned my nose.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The metallic stench that burned my nose.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The rain was redder than the shadow of the crimson sky, and strangely warm.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The rain was redder than the shadow of the crimson sky, and strangely warm.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The rain was redder than the shadow of the crimson sky, and strangely warm.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is this... blood?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is this... blood?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is this... blood?

root.m_Talk_ENG: When I looked up just now...
root.m_Talk_DEU: When I looked up just now...
root.m_Talk_FRA: When I looked up just now...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Something was coming down from the sky.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Something was coming down from the sky.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Something was coming down from the sky.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Something came down into the city?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Something came down into the city?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Something came down into the city?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where did it go?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where did it go?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where did it go?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That way... I mean...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That way... I mean...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That way... I mean...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We have to go where Momo is!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We have to go where Momo is!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We have to go where Momo is!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right now!
